auth.label: Access Token
auth.description: LaunchDarkly personal or service access token sent with the Authorization request header. Create it from LaunchDarkly account authorization settings.

actions.name: add_member_to_teams
actions.description: Add one or more LaunchDarkly members to one or more teams with a semantic patch update.

memberIds.description: The LaunchDarkly member identifiers to add to teams.

teamKeys.description: The LaunchDarkly team keys that should receive the members.

comment.description: The comment to attach to the update.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

memberIDs.description: The member identifiers that were processed by the update.

teamKeys.description: The team keys that were processed by the update.

errors.description: A list of LaunchDarkly JSON objects.

outputSchema.description: The result of adding members to multiple LaunchDarkly teams.

actions.name: create_environment
actions.description: Create a LaunchDarkly environment using either common fields or a full official request body.

color.description: The display color for the environment.

defaultTtl.description: The default time-to-live value for temporary targeting, in minutes.

secureMode.description: Whether secure mode should be enabled for the environment.

defaultTrackEvents.description: Whether event tracking should be enabled by default.

confirmChanges.description: Whether UI changes should require confirmation.

requireComments.description: Whether UI changes should require comments.

tags.description: The tags to assign to the environment.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The display color configured for the environment.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the environment.

actions.name: create_feature_flag
actions.description: Create a LaunchDarkly feature flag using either common fields or a full official request body.

key.description: The feature flag key to create.

name.description: The feature flag name to create.

temporary.description: Whether the feature flag is temporary.

tags.description: The tags to assign to the feature flag.

variations.description: A list of LaunchDarkly JSON objects.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The LaunchDarkly feature flag description.

archived.description: Whether the feature flag is archived.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the feature flag.

actions.name: create_project
actions.description: Create a LaunchDarkly project using either common fields or a full official request body.

includeInSnippetByDefault.description: Whether new flags should be included in snippets by default.

tags.description: The tags to assign to the project.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The LaunchDarkly project description.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the project.

actions.name: create_segment
actions.description: Create a LaunchDarkly segment using either common fields or a full official request body.

tags.description: The tags to assign to the segment.

included.description: The context keys to include in the segment.

excluded.description: The context keys to exclude from the segment.

rules.description: A list of LaunchDarkly JSON objects.

unbounded.description: Whether the segment should be configured as unbounded.

unboundedContextKind.description: The context kind used for unbounded segment membership.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The LaunchDarkly segment description.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the segment.

included.description: The included context keys configured on the segment.

excluded.description: The excluded context keys configured on the segment.

rules.description: A list of LaunchDarkly JSON objects.

actions.name: create_team
actions.description: Create a LaunchDarkly team using either common fields or a full official request body.

customRoleKeys.description: The custom role keys to assign to the team.

memberIds.description: The member identifiers to assign to the team.

maintainerIds.description: The member identifiers to assign as team maintainers.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The LaunchDarkly team description.

customRoleKeys.description: The custom role keys assigned to the team.

maintainerIds.description: The member identifiers assigned as maintainers for the team.

memberIds.description: The member identifiers assigned to the team.

actions.name: create_token
actions.description: Create a LaunchDarkly access token using either common fields or a full official request body.

name.description: The access token name to create.

role.description: The base role assigned to the token.

customRoleIds.description: The custom role identifiers assigned to the token.

serviceToken.description: Whether the token should be a service token.

defaultApiVersion.description: The default API version to associate with the token.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The LaunchDarkly access token description.
The base role assigned to the token.
The token secret value, when returned by LaunchDarkly.

customRoleIds.description: The custom role identifiers assigned to the token.

actions.name: get_caller_identity
actions.description: Get the LaunchDarkly caller identity for the current access token.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The LaunchDarkly account identifier for the caller.
The LaunchDarkly account name for the caller.
The access token identifier for the caller.
The access token name for the caller.
The LaunchDarkly member identifier for the caller.

scopes.description: The scopes or permission strings returned for the caller.

outputSchema.description: The LaunchDarkly caller identity for the provided access token.

actions.name: get_context_instances
actions.description: Get a LaunchDarkly context instance by project key, environment key, and context instance identifier.

filter.description: The LaunchDarkly filter expression to apply to the result set.

sort.description: The LaunchDarkly sort expression to apply to the result set.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return.

continuationToken.description: The continuation token returned by a previous paginated response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The context string.
A LaunchDarkly JSON object.

context.description: The context payload returned by LaunchDarkly.

anyOf.description: The timestamp when LaunchDarkly last saw the context.

associatedContexts.description: The number of associated contexts returned for the item.

items.description: The collection items returned by LaunchDarkly.

totalCount.description: The total number of matching items returned by LaunchDarkly.

anyOf.description: The continuation token for the next page.

actions.name: patch_environment
actions.description: Patch a LaunchDarkly environment with standard JSON Patch operations.

path.description: The JSON Pointer path that the patch operation targets.

from.description: The source JSON Pointer path for move or copy operations.

value.description: The value used by the patch operation.

anyOf.description: The display color configured for the environment.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the environment.

actions.name: patch_feature_flag
actions.description: Patch a LaunchDarkly feature flag with JSON Patch, JSON Merge Patch, or semantic patch instructions.

dryRun.description: Whether to validate the patch without applying it.

ignoreConflicts.description: Whether to ignore conflicts during patch execution.

path.description: The JSON Pointer path that the patch operation targets.

from.description: The source JSON Pointer path for move or copy operations.

value.description: The value used by the patch operation.

merge.description: The JSON Merge Patch payload to apply.

items.description: A semantic patch instruction accepted by LaunchDarkly.

comment.description: The comment to attach to the update, when supported.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The LaunchDarkly feature flag description.

archived.description: Whether the feature flag is archived.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the feature flag.
